sections.heading: 1. Controller
sections.body: The controller for data processing on this website is [company name / owner], [address], 74564 Crailsheim. For privacy questions, reach us at mbt@nex-a-i.com.

sections.heading: 2. Collection and processing
sections.body: We process personal data only to the extent necessary to provide the website and our services — in particular data you submit via the contact form (name, email, company, message).

sections.heading: 3. Legal basis
sections.body: Processing is based on Art. 6(1)(a), (b) and (f) GDPR (consent, contract initiation, legitimate interest).

sections.heading: 4. Retention period
sections.body: We store personal data only as long as necessary for the stated purposes or as required by statutory retention periods.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

sections.heading: 6. Hosting & third parties
sections.body: This website is hosted by [hosting provider]. If analytics or third-party services are used, we will inform you separately here and obtain your consent where required.
